mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_base (title, content, tags, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{tags}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_base SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, tags = #{tags}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE knowledge_base SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
